description: CLAUDE.md has no test command entry; R34 requires a documented way to run the test suite

description: 3 vague quantifiers: 'Some items' (×2) and 'niche-relevant'; replace with explicit thresholds or criteria
suggested_fix: Replace 'Some items' with specific counts and 'niche-relevant' with a named criterion such as 'DR≥40 sites in the same topic cluster'

description: 2 vague quantifiers: 'sufficient data' and 'Some EEAT items'; replace with concrete thresholds
suggested_fix: Replace 'sufficient data' with a minimum sample size and 'Some EEAT items' with the named checklist items

description: 2 vague quantifiers: 'topic-relevant link opportunities' and 'Add relevant links'
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria such as 'links from pages sharing ≥2 topic-cluster tags'

description: 2 vague quantifiers including 'Relevant audience'; replace with concrete criteria
suggested_fix: Replace 'Relevant audience' with a specific audience definition or DR/niche threshold

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'locate relevant WARM files'
suggested_fix: Replace with a specific criterion such as 'WARM files whose tags overlap the current task keywords'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'For each relevant category'
suggested_fix: Replace 'relevant category' with an explicit list of categories to check

description: Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in 'Selects appropriate Schema.org types'
suggested_fix: Replace with a decision table mapping page type to schema type

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'on-page-relevant items'
suggested_fix: Replace with an explicit named checklist of on-page items to audit

description: Vague quantifier 'properly' in 'properly crawling'
suggested_fix: Replace with a specific check such as 'returning HTTP 200 and not blocked by robots.txt'

description: FileChanged hook event is not in the NLPM conventions hook-events list (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop)
fp_reason: The hook intentionally watches memory/hot-cache.md line count as part of the documented HOT-tier memory management design; FileChanged is likely a Claude Code event added after the conventions file was written
rule_gap: conventions/SKILL.md hook-events list may be incomplete; FileChanged should be validated against the current Claude Code SDK before penalizing
